perks.name: Heart of the Sea
perks.description: Grants %{VALUE:SEA_CREATURE_CHANCE} %{STAT:SEA_CREATURE_CHANCE} to your pet for each %{KEYWORD:HEART_OF_THE_MOUNTAIN} level.

perks.name: Expert Cave Fisher

perks.name: Gift of the Ammonite
perks.description: Each Mining and Fishing level grants %{VALUE:FISHING_SPEED} %{STAT:FISHING_SPEED}, %{VALUE:WALK_SPEED} %{STAT:WALK_SPEED} and %{VALUE:DEFENSE} %{STAT:DEFENSE}.

perks.name: Armored Tank
perks.description: Gain %{VALUE:DEFAULT} of your %{STAT:DEFENSE} as %{STAT:STRENGTH}. %{FORMAT:DARK_GRAY}(Max +1,000)

perks.name: Unyielding
perks.description: Increase the effectiveness of %{ENCHANTMENT:LAST_STAND} and %{ATTRIBUTE:LIFELINE} by %{VALUE:DEFAULT}.

perks.name: Clubbed Tail
perks.description: Every 5th hit deals %{VALUE:5TH_HIT} of your final damage to enemies within 5 blocks. Enemies hit deal %{VALUE:LESS_DAMAGE} less damage for 10s.

perks.name: Ridable
perks.description: Right-click your summoned pet to ride it! Moves faster based on your %{STAT:WALK_SPEED}.

perks.name: Tunneller
perks.description: While in the %{ZONE:CRYSTAL_HOLLOWS}, this Pet breaks all blocks in its path using your held item.

perks.name: Rolling Miner
perks.description: Every %{VALUE:DEFAULT} seconds, the next %{KEYWORD:GEMSTONE} you mine gives %{MULTIPLIER:2} drops

perks.name: Long Claws
perks.description: Grants %{VALUE:MINING_SPREAD} %{STAT:MINING_SPREAD} while mining Hard Stone.

perks.name: Ice Shields
perks.description: Gain %{VALUE:DEFAULT} of your %{STAT:STRENGTH} as %{STAT:DEFENSE}.

perks.name: Furnace

perks.name: Dispersion

perks.description: %{VALUE:DEFAULT} chance to fish up spooky sea creatures

perks.name: Hive

perks.name: Supernatural

While at less than %{FORMAT:GREEN}20% HP%{FORMAT:GRAY}, reduce incoming damage by %{FORMAT:GREEN}20%%{FORMAT:GRAY}. Additionally, gain a temporary shield equal to %{FORMAT:GREEN}40% %{FORMAT:GRAY}of your maximum health and deal ${FORMAT:GREEN}40% %{FORMAT:GRAY}more damage.
%{FORMAT:DARK_GRAY}(Lasts 12s, 60s cooldown)

%{FORMAT:DARK_GRAY}60s cooldown

perks.name: Fourth Flare
perks.description: On 4th melee strike, %{FORMAT:GOLD}ignite %{FORMAT:GRAY}mobs, dealing %{VALUE:DAMAGE} your %{STAT:CRIT_DAMAGE} each second for %{VALUE:DURATION} seconds

perks.name: Magic Bird
perks.description: You may always fly on your private island and garden

perks.name: Eternal Coins
perks.description: Don't lose coins from death.

perks.name: Ridable
perks.description: %{KEYWORD:RIDABLE}

perks.name: Run
perks.description: Increases the speed of your mount by %{VALUE:DEFAULT}.

perks.name: Sprint
perks.description: While holding an %{ITEM:ENCHANTED_CARROT_ON_A_STICK}, increases the speed of your mount by %{VALUE:DEFAULT}.

perks.name: Trample
perks.description: Your pig will break all crops that it walks over while on your pivate island or Garden. While riding, %{STAT:FARMING_FORTUNE} and %{FORMAT:GREEN}Farming Exp %{FORMAT:GRAY}gain is reduced by %{VALUE:REDUCED}.

perks.name: Bacon Farmer
perks.description: Pig minions work %{VALUE:MINION_SPEED} faster while on your island

perks.name: Pork Master
perks.description: Buffs the %{ITEM:PIGMAN_SWORD} by %{VALUE:DAMAGE} %{STAT:DAMAGE} and %{VALUE:STRENGTH} %{STAT:STRENGTH}.

perks.name: Giant Slayer
perks.description: Deal %{VALUE:LEVEL_50_DAMAGE} damage to monsters Level %{FORMAT:GREEN}50+ %{FORMAT:GRAY}and %{VALUE:LEVEL_100_DAMAGE} damage to monsters Level %{FORMAT:GREEN}100+%{FORMAT:GRAY}.

perks.name: Happy Feet
perks.description: Jump potions also give %{VALUE:DEFAULT} speed

perks.name: Farming Wisdom Boost
perks.description: Grants %{VALUE:FARMING_WISDOM} %{STAT:FARMING_WISDOM}.

perks.name: Efficient Farming
perks.description: Farming minions work %{VALUE:MINION_SPEED} faster while on your island

perks.name: Chocolate Injections
perks.description: Increases %{KEYWORD:CHOCOLATE_FACTORY} production by %{VALUE:PRODUCTION}. Duplicate %{KEYWORDS:CHOCOLATE_RABBIT} that you find grant %{VALUE:CHOCOLATE} %{KEYWORD:CHOCOLATE}.

perks.name: Morph
perks.description: ${KEYWORD:MORPH}

perks.name: CHEESE!
perks.description: As as Rat, you smell %{KEYWORD:CHEESE} nearby! Yummy!

perks.name: Rat's Blessing
perks.description: Has a chance to grant a random player %{VALUE:MAGIC_FIND} %{STAT:MAGIC_FIND} for %{VALUE:DURATION} seconds after finding a yummy piece of Cheese! If the player gets a drop during this buff, you have a %{VALUE:CHANCE} chance to get it too.

perks.name: Extreme Speed
perks.description: The Rat is TWO times faster.

perks.name: Winter Sprint
perks.description: Gain %{FORMAT:LIGHT_PURPLE}double %{FORMAT:GRAY}pet %{KEYWORD:EXP}.

perks.name: Infused
perks.description: Gives %{VALUE:FISHING_SPEED} %{STAT:FISHING_SPEED} and %{VALUE:SEA_CREATURE_CHANCE} %{STAT:SEA_CREATURE_CHANCE} while on %{ZONE:JERRYS_WORKSHOP}.

perks.name: Snow Power
perks.description: Grants %{VALUE:CHANCE} bonus gift chance during the %{KEYWORD:GIFT_ATTACK} event.

perks.name: Icy Wind
perks.description: Grants %{VALUE:CHANCE} chance of getting double %{ESSENCE:ICE}.

perks.name: Orbs are Fun
perks.description: Gain %{VALUE:DEFAULT} experience from %{FORMAT:AQUA}XP Orbs%{FORMAT:GRAY}.

perks.name: Ridable
perks.description: %{KEYWORD:RIDABLE}

perks.name: Fortify
perks.description: While sitting on your rock, gain %{VALUE:DEFENSE} defense

perks.name: Steady Ground
perks.description: While sitting on your rock, deal %{VALUE:DAMAGE} damage

perks.name: Burrowing
perks.description: Grants a %{VALUE:CHANCE} chance to find %{KEYWORDS:TREASURE_CHEST} while mining.

perks.name: Drill Infusion
perks.description: Grants %{VALUE:GEMSTONE_FORTUNE} %{STAT:GEMSTONE_FORTUNE} to Drills.

perks.name: Bejeweled Eyes
perks.description: Earn %{VALUE:POWDER} %{KEYWORD:GEMSTONE_POWDER} from all sources.

perks.name: Mana Saver
perks.description: Reduces the mana cost of abilitites by %{VALUE:REDUCE}.

perks.name: Overheal
perks.description: Gives a %{VALUE:SHIELD} shield after not taking damage for 10s

perks.name: Dungeon Wizard
perks.description: Increases your total mana by %{VALUE:TOTAL_MANA} while in dungeons.

perks.name: Magnetic
perks.description: Earn %{VALUE:DEFAULT} more Exp when mining.

perks.name: Experienced Burrower
perks.description: Grants %{VALUE:MINING_WISDOM} %{STAT:MINING_WISDOM}.

perks.name: Dexterity
perks.description: Grants %{VALUE:MINING_SPEED} %{STAT:MINING_SPEED} and permanent %{FORMAT:YELLOW}Haste %{VALUE:HASTE}.

perks.name: Bone Arrows
perks.description: Increases arrow damage by %{VALUE:ARROW_DAMAGE} which is doubled while in dungeons

perks.name: Combo
perks.description: Gain a combo stack for every bow hit granting %{VALUE:HIT} %{STAT:STRENGTH}. Max %{VALUE:MAX_STACKS} stacks, stacks disappear after 8 seconds.

perks.name: Skeletal Defense
perks.description: Your skeleton shoots an arrow dealing %{VALUE:ARROW} your %{STAT:CRIT_DAMAGE} when a mob gets close to you (5s cooldown)

perks.name: Ridable
perks.description: %{KEYWORD:RIDABLE}

perks.name: Run
perks.description: Increases the speed of your mount by %{VALUE:MOUNT_SPEED}.

perks.name: Ride Into Battle
perks.description: While riding your horse, gain %{VALUE:BOW_DAMAGE} bow damage.

perks.name: Slow and Steady
perks.description: When fishing in the %{ZONE:CRIMSON_ISLE}, %{TROPHY_FISH:SLUGFISH} take %{VALUE:DURATION} less time to catch.

perks.name: Pest Friends
perks.description: Grants %{VALUE:BONUS_PEST_CHANCE} %{STAT:BONUS_PEST_CHANCE}.

perks.name: Repugnant Aroma
perks.description: When farming in a plot affected by a %{ITEM:SPRAYONATOR}, gain %{VALUE:FARMING_FORTUNE} %{STAT:FARMING_FORTUNE}.

perks.name: Red Sand Enjoyer
perks.description: %{FORMAT:BLUE}Red Sand Minions %{FORMAT:GRAY}work %{VALUE:MINION_SPEED} faster while on your %{ZONE:PRIVATE_ISLAND}.

perks.name: Slow and Steady
perks.description: Convert every %{VALUE:WALK_SPEED} %{STAT:WALK_SPEED} you have above %{VALUE:SCALAR} into %{VALUE:BLOCK_FORTUNE} %{STAT:BLOCK_FORTUNE}.

perks.name: Slimy Reach
perks.description: Grants %{VALUE:MINING_SPREAD} %{STAT:MINING_SPREAD} while mining %{FORMAT:BLUE}Blocks%{FORMAT:GRAY}.

perks.name: Blizzard
perks.description: Enemies within %{VALUE:DISTANCE} blocks are slowed by %{VALUE:SLOWED} and deal %{VALUE:LESS_DAMAGE} less damage.

perks.name: Frostbite
perks.description: Your freezing aura slows enemy attacks causing you to take %{VALUE:REDUCED} reduced damage

perks.name: Snow Cannon
perks.description:
Shoots a snowball towards an enemy when you attack dealing %{VALUE:LAST_DAMAGE} of your last dealt melee damage, capped at %{VALUE:CAPPED_DAMAGE}.
%{FORMAT:DARK_GRAY}(1s cooldown)

perks.name: Ouch!
perks.description: Your snowballs have %{VALUE:CHANCE} chance of dealing %{FORMAT:RED}double %{FORMAT:GRAY}damage!

perks.name: One With The Spider
perks.description: Applies %{VALUE:STRENGTH} %{STAT:STRENGTH} to all %{MOB_TYPE:ARACHNAL} weapons, armor, and equipment you have equipped.

perks.name: Web-weaver
perks.description: Upon hitting a monster, it becomes slowed by %{VALUE:SLOWED}.

perks.name: Spider Whisperer
perks.description: Spider, Cave Spider and Tarantula minions work %{VALUE:MINION_SPEED} faster while on your island.

perks.name: Web Battlefield
perks.description:
Killing mobs grants %{VALUE:STRENGTH} %{STAT:STRENGTH} and %{VALUE:MAGIC_FIND} %{STAT:MAGIC_FIND} for %{VALUE:DURATION} to all players staying within %{VALUE:DISTANCE} blocks of where they died.
%{FORMAT:DARK_GRAY}Stacks up to 10 times.

perks.description: %{KEYWORDS:SEA_CREATURE} spawn with %{VALUE:MISSING_HEALTH} of their maximum health missing.

perks.description: Gain %{VALUE:MAGIC_FIND} %{STAT:MAGIC_FIND} against %{KEYWORDS:SEA_CREATURE}.

perks.name: Half Life

perks.description: Combat stats granted by pet items on this pet are increased by %{VALUE:INCREASE}.

perks.name: Webbed Cells
perks.description: Anti-healing is %{VALUE:ANTI_HEAL} less effective against you.

perks.description: Take %{VALUE:LESS_DAMAGE} less damage from %{MOB_TYPE:SKELETAL} mobs.
